framework.name: Secure Software Development Guide
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Secure coding practices and development process security for software projects
framework.structure_description: Recommendations for secure development lifecycle, input validation, memory safety, cryptographic usage, dependency management, and secure build/deployment.

controls.title: Secure development lifecycle
controls.description: Integrate security at every stage of the development lifecycle: requirements, design, coding, testing, deployment.
controls.description_nl: Integrer la securite a chaque etape du cycle de developpement : exigences, conception, codage, tests, deploiement.

controls.title: Threat modeling during design
controls.title_nl: Modelisation des menaces en phase de conception
controls.description: Conduct threat modeling during the design phase to identify security requirements and attack surfaces.
controls.description_nl: Conduire une modelisation des menaces en phase de conception pour identifier les exigences de securite et les surfaces d'attaque.

controls.title: Input validation
controls.description: Validate all inputs on the server side using allowlists. Never trust client-side validation alone.
controls.description_nl: Valider toutes les entrees cote serveur en utilisant des listes d'autorisation. Ne jamais faire confiance a la validation cote client seule.

controls.title: Output encoding
controls.description: Encode all outputs contextually to prevent injection attacks (XSS, SQL injection, command injection).
controls.description_nl: Encoder toutes les sorties de maniere contextuelle pour prevenir les attaques par injection (XSS, injection SQL, injection de commandes).

controls.title: Parameterized queries
controls.description: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements for all database interactions. Never concatenate user input into queries.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser des requetes parametrees ou des instructions preparees pour toutes les interactions avec la base de donnees. Ne jamais concatener les entrees utilisateur dans les requetes.

controls.title: Memory-safe coding
controls.description: Avoid buffer overflows, use-after-free, and null pointer dereferences through memory-safe languages or strict coding disciplines.
controls.description_nl: Eviter les debordements de tampon, les utilisations apres liberation et les dereferencements de pointeur nul par des langages surs pour la memoire ou des disciplines de codage strictes.

controls.title: Cryptographic best practices
controls.description: Use established cryptographic libraries, avoid custom implementations, follow ANSSI cryptographic recommendations for algorithm selection.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser des bibliotheques cryptographiques etablies, eviter les implementations personnalisees, suivre les recommandations cryptographiques de l'ANSSI pour la selection des algorithmes.

controls.title: Secret management in code
controls.title_nl: Gestion des secrets dans le code
controls.description: Never hardcode secrets (passwords, API keys, certificates) in source code. Use secret management systems.
controls.description_nl: Ne jamais coder en dur les secrets (mots de passe, cles API, certificats) dans le code source. Utiliser des systemes de gestion des secrets.

controls.title: Dependency management
controls.description: Maintain an inventory of all dependencies, monitor for known vulnerabilities, and update promptly.
controls.description_nl: Maintenir un inventaire de toutes les dependances, surveiller les vulnerabilites connues et mettre a jour rapidement.

controls.title: Static analysis in CI/CD
controls.description: Integrate static application security testing (SAST) into the CI/CD pipeline to detect vulnerabilities before deployment.
controls.description_nl: Integrer les tests statiques de securite applicative (SAST) dans le pipeline CI/CD pour detecter les vulnerabilites avant le deploiement.

controls.title: Dynamic testing
controls.description: Perform dynamic application security testing (DAST) and penetration testing before production release.
controls.description_nl: Realiser des tests dynamiques de securite applicative (DAST) et des tests d'intrusion avant la mise en production.

controls.title: Secure build pipeline
controls.description: Secure the build pipeline: sign artifacts, use reproducible builds, restrict pipeline access, verify dependencies.
controls.description_nl: Securiser le pipeline de construction : signer les artefacts, utiliser des constructions reproductibles, restreindre l'acces au pipeline, verifier les dependances.
